title: ClassifyAxisPreflightSpec
description:
Input spec for the ``classify-axis-preflight`` composite primitive (WS5 #6).

Collapses the top of ``hpc-classify-axis`` — Step 1 (``discover-runs``),
Step 2 (cache-check: reuse a still-valid classification from
``.hpc/axes.yaml``) and Step 3 (``recall``: pre-fill from prior
campaigns) — into ONE CLI call. Mirror of ``status-preflight`` /
``submit-preflight``: a sequence of sub-calls each returning a
``SubResult`` plus the overall verdict.

The ``recall`` sub-call is conditional: it runs only when neither the
caller supplied ``data_axis`` (``data_axis_supplied``) NOR the
cache-check found a still-valid classification — either makes
pre-filling from memory moot.

experiment_dir.title: Experiment Dir
experiment_dir.description: Absolute path to the experiment directory.

run_name.title: Run Name
run_name.description: Name of the @register_run function to cache-check against executors.<run> in axes.yaml. When omitted, the cache-check reports a miss (the skill resolves the single run from discover-runs' output before reusing).

run_signature_sha.title: Run Signature Sha
run_signature_sha.description: The run's current run_signature_sha. A cache hit requires the stored executors.<run> entry's run_signature_sha to equal this; a mismatch (signature drift) or a null here is reported as a miss.

root.title: Root
root.description: Experiments root passed to recall --root. When omitted, recall falls back to ~/.hpc-agent/config.json:experiment_roots.

task_kind.title: Task Kind
task_kind.description: Passed to recall --task-kind to scope prior campaigns to the same intent.task_kind.

data_axis_supplied.title: Data Axis Supplied
data_axis_supplied.description: Set when the caller already resolved data_axis (the slash / interview path). Skips the recall sub-call — the classification is already decided, so pre-filling from memory is moot.

timeout_sec.title: Timeout Sec
timeout_sec.description: Per-subprocess-sub-call timeout. discover-runs walks notebooks/ (single-digit seconds); recall walks interview.json under --root (filesystem-bound). The cache-check is an in-process axes.yaml read and is not subject to this timeout.
